title: muhlenbergia mutica
intro: Muhlenbergia mutica, commonly known as big bluestem or tall blue grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Muhlenbergia mutica include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Muhlenbergia mutica can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in a decoction to create a medicinal tincture.
